name: Carnell's Auto Detail
what_they_do: Full-service auto detailing and collision repair shop on N. Main Street in Sikeston, Missouri
no_website_confirmed: Only presence found: Yelp listing and Yahoo Local — no standalone domain found. Facebook page also present.
talking_points: Ask for owner's name to personalize the site header and About section
Confirm exact pricing for exterior, interior, and full detail packages
Ask if they offer mobile detailing or pick-up/drop-off service
Ask if they want a photo gallery (before/after shots work great for detailers)
Ask about any seasonal promotions or package deals
Confirm current hours — they may have Saturday availability
